pneuma.help:
pneuma-skills [mode] [options]

Modes:
  (no argument)                Open the Launcher (marketplace UI)
  webcraft                     Web design with Impeccable.style
  slide                        HTML presentations
  doc                          Markdown with live preview
  draw                         Excalidraw canvas
  illustrate                   AI illustration studio
  mode-maker                   Create custom modes with AI
  evolve                       Launch the Evolution Agent
  /path/to/mode                Load from a local directory
  github:user/repo             Load from GitHub
  https://...tar.gz            Load from URL

Options:
  --workspace <path>           Target workspace directory (default: cwd)
  --port <number>              Preferred server port
  --backend <type>             Agent backend ({{backendList}}; default: {{defaultBackend}})
  --no-open                    Don't auto-open the browser
  --no-prompt                  Non-interactive mode
  --skip-skill                 Skip skill installation
  --debug                      Enable debug mode
  --dev                        Force dev mode (Vite)
  --help, -h                   Show this help
  --version, -v                Show version
pneuma.bun_not_running: Not running under Bun. Pneuma requires Bun >= {{min}}
pneuma.bun_too_old: Bun {{current}} detected, but >= {{min}} is required. Terminal features may not work. Run `bun upgrade` to update.

Workspace does not exist: {{workspace}}
  Create it?

pneuma.backend_mismatch: Workspace is already bound to backend "{{backend}}". Launch with --backend {{backend}} or remove .pneuma/session.json to start fresh.
pneuma.skill_replace_prompt: Skill already exists. Replace with latest?
pneuma.skill_deps_bundled_hint: Skill files must be bundled in the mode package before running.
pneuma.skill_deps_fix_hint: Fix the mode package and try again.
pneuma.viewer_compile_failed: Mode viewer compilation failed — viewer may not load
pneuma.vite_starting: Starting Vite dev server on port {{port}}...
pneuma.continue_work_launched: Continue Work: agent launched, session active
pneuma.export_replay_failed: Failed to export replay from source: {{message}}. Continuing without replay.
pneuma.viewing_dashboard_only: Viewing mode: dashboard only, no agent
pneuma.switching_to_edit: Switching to edit mode: installing skill and launching agent...
pneuma.switching_to_viewing: Switching to viewing mode: stopping agent...

project.no_pneuma_data: No Pneuma data found at {{path}}. Use the launcher's "Create Project" dialog for a fresh setup.

evolve.no_proposals_error: No proposals found. Run `pneuma evolve` first.
evolve.applied: Applied {{count}} file(s). Use `pneuma evolve rollback` to revert.
evolve.no_mode_specified:
No mode specified and no .pneuma/session.json found.
Use: pneuma evolve --mode <mode> --workspace <path>
evolve.default_recent_mode: No --mode given; defaulting to most recent project session mode: {{mode}}
evolve.default_doc_mode: No --mode given and no project sessions found; defaulting to 'doc' for skill bootstrap.
evolve.unsupported_backend: Evolve mode only supports backends: {{backends}}. Selected backend "{{backend}}" is not compatible.

add.is_builtin: "{{name}}" is a built-in mode — no need to add.
add.library_up_to_date: Library "{{name}}" already up to date ({{total}} {{modesWord}}, {{activated}} activated).

library.usage:
Usage:
  pneuma library init <name> [--display "..."] [--description "..."] [--github user/repo] [--private]
  pneuma library link <source>
  pneuma library list
  pneuma library sync <id>
  pneuma library publish <mode> [--to <library-id>] [--as <new-name>] [--push]
  pneuma library push <id>
  pneuma library unlink <id> [--force]
  pneuma library activate <id> <mode>
  pneuma library deactivate <id> <mode>

link.is_single_mode: That repo is a single mode, not a library — use `pneuma mode add` instead.

list.none: No libraries linked. Try `pneuma library link github:user/repo`.

sync.not_library_on_disk: Library "{{id}}" no longer looks like a library on disk.
sync.up_to_date: Library "{{id}}" already up to date ({{total}} {{modesWord}}, {{activated}} activated).

publish.mode_not_found: Mode "{{mode}}" not found in ~/.pneuma/modes/ or builtin modes/.
publish.no_libraries: No libraries linked. Run `pneuma library init <name>` or `pneuma library link <source>` first.

unlink.confirm: Unlink library "{{id}}"? This will delete its on-disk clone.

add.invalid_github: Invalid GitHub specifier. Expected: github:user/repo or github:user/repo#branch
add.invalid_no_manifest: Invalid plugin: no manifest.ts found in {{path}}

remove.is_builtin: "{{name}}" is a built-in plugin and cannot be removed. You can disable it in Settings.

history.replay_hint: To replay in a running session:

handoff.usage:
Usage: pneuma handoff --json '<json>' | --stdin

Emit a structured handoff to the active Pneuma session. The server shows the
user a HandoffCard; if confirmed, the target session is spawned with the
payload pre-loaded. Reads JSON with these fields:

  target_mode       string   required  Mode name (e.g. "webcraft")
  target_session    string   optional  Existing session id, "auto", or omit
  intent            string   required  One sentence — what the target does
  summary           string   optional  Few sentences on what's done here
  suggested_files   string[] optional  Project-relative paths, ordered
  key_decisions     string[] optional  Locked-in decisions for the target
  open_questions    string[] optional  Things the target should resolve

Env vars:
  PNEUMA_SERVER_URL   POSTed against
  PNEUMA_SESSION_ID   source session id (auto-injected)
handoff.missing_session_id: error: PNEUMA_SESSION_ID env var not set (must run inside a session)
handoff.missing_server_url: error: PNEUMA_SERVER_URL env var not set (must run inside a session)
handoff.fetch_failed: error: failed to reach Pneuma server at {{url}}: {{message}}

refine.usage:
Usage: pneuma session refine --json '<json>' | --stdin

Rewrite the active Pneuma session's UI metadata so the launcher and
ProjectPanel rows reflect what the session is actually about, instead of
the mode-based default + the first `<pneuma:env>` synthetic message.

JSON payload fields (at least one is required):

  displayName   string   ≤40 chars — a short title for the session
  description   string   ≤280 chars — one or two sentences

The agent uses this when the conversation has produced enough substance for
a meaningful summary, or when the user explicitly asks for a re-titling.

Env vars:
  PNEUMA_SERVER_URL   POSTed against
  PNEUMA_SESSION_ID   active session id (auto-injected)
refine.missing_session_id: error: PNEUMA_SESSION_ID env var not set (must run inside a session)
refine.missing_server_url: error: PNEUMA_SERVER_URL env var not set (must run inside a session)
refine.fetch_failed: error: failed to reach Pneuma server at {{url}}: {{message}}
